raw_consumer_statement:
Citi Best Buy Credit Card is refusing to apply my refund from my cancelled Best Buy purchase with Order Number : XXXX to my credit card balance. This is my second complaint, and i attached their prior response to the complaint to this and my response to it that they never took action on. 

This purchase was made on XX/XX/year>, and the package never arrived and no proof of delivery was left. I contacted Best Buy customer service on XX/XX/year> and opened Case ID XXXX. Upon investigation and filing for theft, On XX/XX/year>, Best Buy confirmed my refund via email. My Best Buy account showed the refund credit was applied but listed as " pending ''. 

I stopped checking my account after this, and since the purchase was a promotional 6-month to pay timeline, I did not realize the Citi Best Buy credit card never reflected my refund until months later. I tried contacting support but was continuously forced to pay.

When i was able to reach Citi best buy department, they claimed they can not verify the return and asked me to prove it.

This has taken way too long and this is the second time i am filing this complain before taking legal action and reporting this incident widely online.

This is also hurting my credit score! 

Initial complaint closed by the company without any resolution : XXXX
